title: Let's Share Rebrand
description: Let's Share is a premium food brand in Muscat that creates sharing boxes for all kinds of gatherings. The goal of this rebrand was to improve the brand without changing what made it special. I kept the original idea and plated it out cohesively back tying the food with the gestures.
client: Let's Share founder, Marwa, reached out to me with hopes of taking her brand to the next level. Her cloud kitchen had already turned into a restaurant and now she was ready to invest in enhancing her overall brand outlook.
